mapper.select: SELECT c.COMMENT_ID AS commentId , c.POST_ID AS postId , c.USER_EMAIL AS userEmail , c.PARENT_COMMENT_ID AS parentCommentId , c.CONTENT AS content , c.CREATED_AT AS createdAt , c.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt , c.DELETED_AT AS deletedAt , c.DEL_YN AS delYn , u.NICKNAME AS nickname , (SELECT title FROM posts WHERE post_id = c.post_id) AS title , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_code = '02' AND l.target_id = c.comment_id) AS likeCount , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_code = '02' AND l.target_id = c.comment_id AND l.user_email = #{userEmail}) AS isLiked , 0 AS reportCnt FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.USER_EMAIL = u.EMAIL WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_email, parent_comment_id, content, del_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userEmail}, #{parent_comment_id}, #{content}, 'N', NOW())
INSERT INTO likes (target_code, target_id, user_email) VALUES ('02', #{commentId}, #{userEmail})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_code = '02' AND target_id = #{commentId} AND user_email = #{userEmail}
SELECT user_email FROM comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND del_yn = 'N'
